summary: Prototype verified and saved as Build input. Created a local prototype artifact for building custom Circuit flows from existing blocks and inspecting pre-packaged flows.
build_followup_prompt: Build from the Prototype artifact in docs/release/proofs/runs/prototype/run/prototype-files. Preserve the useful interaction from docs/release/proofs/runs/prototype/run/prototype-files/index.html, but implement it as production code only after reviewing the Prototype result and limitations.
residual_risks: Prototype is not wired to live Circuit flow-saving behavior.
Core-flow inspection uses static fixture content.
next_step: Use build_followup_prompt as the starting brief for Build when you are ready to turn this prototype into production code.
